name: Xinjiang Tianrun Dairy Co., Ltd.
summary: Xinjiang Tianrun Dairy Co., Ltd. operates in the dairy farming industry in China. It offers yogurt, milk powder, milk drink, cheese, fresh milk, milk beer, concentrated milk, fermented milk, and other dairy products. The company provides its products under the Tianrun, Gary, Jiali, and other brands, as well as Ecolean name. Xinjiang Tianrun Dairy Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Urumqi, China.
